hero.title: Your Gateway to Global Sourcing
hero.subtitle: Trivalo Sourcing connects international businesses with verified Chinese manufacturers — from product discovery to door-to-door delivery.

services.title: Everything You Need, Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From finding the right manufacturer to shipping goods to your door, we manage the entire process so you don't have to.
services.sourcing_desc: We identify and shortlist the best manufacturers for your specific product requirements and budget.
services.verification_desc: Thorough background checks, factory audits, and certifications review to protect your supply chain.
services.quality_desc: On-site inspectors at every stage ensure your goods meet exact specifications before they ship.
services.shipping_desc: Full freight management by sea, air, or express — from factory gate to your warehouse.

why.title: Why Choose Trivalo Sourcing?
why.subtitle: We combine on-the-ground presence in China with international standards and transparent practices.
why.local_desc: Our team lives and works in China, giving you access to insights and relationships no remote agency can offer.
why.multilingual_desc: We communicate fluently in English, Chinese, French, and Arabic — no language barriers, ever.
why.transparent_desc: No hidden commissions from suppliers. Clear, flat-fee pricing on every engagement.
why.endtoend_desc: From first inquiry to delivery, we are your single point of contact for the entire supply chain.

how.title: How It Works
how.subtitle: A simple, proven four-step process to get your products from China to your door.
how.step1_desc: Tell us what you need — product specs, quantity, target price, and timeline.
how.step2_desc: We research, audit, and shortlist the best-fit suppliers and present you with options.
how.step3_desc: We inspect samples and production batches on-site to ensure compliance with your standards.
how.step4_desc: We arrange freight, handle documentation, and track your shipment until it reaches you.

cta.title: Ready to Source Smarter?
cta.subtitle: Get a free consultation with our team. No commitment, no cost.

about.title: About Trivalo Sourcing
about.subtitle: Foreign-owned, China-based, globally focused.
about.story_body:
Trivalo Sourcing was founded by international entrepreneurs who saw firsthand how difficult it was for foreign businesses to navigate China's manufacturing landscape — language barriers, lack of transparency, unreliable middlemen, and quality inconsistencies.

We built Trivalo to be the partner we wished we had: a team that is physically present in China, speaks the language, understands the culture, and holds itself to international standards of transparency and professionalism.
about.mission_body: To make global sourcing from China simple, transparent, and reliable for businesses of all sizes — regardless of where they are in the world.
about.vision_body: A world where any entrepreneur or company can access China's manufacturing excellence without friction, risk, or language barriers.
about.val1_desc: We share everything — supplier details, costs, inspection reports. No black boxes.
about.val2_desc: We deliver on our commitments. If something goes wrong, we own it and fix it.
about.val3_desc: We hold our suppliers and ourselves to the highest quality standards on every project.
about.val4_desc: We think long-term. Your success is our success — we invest in relationships, not transactions.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Tell us about it and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.form_placeholder: Tell us about your product, requirements, or any questions you have...
contact.form_success: Message sent! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Bridging global businesses with China's best manufacturers.
